# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Write secure code.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

# Global Plugin Configurations
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      allowed_origins:
        - "https://example1.com"
        - "https://example2.com"
      allowed_methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      allowed_headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
  - name: authentication
    config:
      strategy: jwt
      jwt_secret: "your-jwt-secret"
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      limit: 100
      window: 60s

# Service Plugin Configurations
services:
  - name: your-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          allowed_origins:
            - "https://example1.com"
            - "https://example2.com"
          allowed_methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          allowed_headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
      - name: authentication
        config:
          strategy: jwt
          jwt_secret: "your-jwt-secret"
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          limit: 100
          window: 60s

# Route Plugin Configurations
routes:
  - name: your-route
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          allowed_origins:
            - "https://example1.com"
            - "https://example2.com"
          allowed_methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          allowed_headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
      - name: authentication
        config:
          strategy: jwt
          jwt_secret: "your-jwt-secret"
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          limit: 100
          window: 60s
